title: A calmer onboarding for new members
problem:
New members signed up but rarely reached their first useful moment. The empty dashboard offered no guidance, so many left before creating anything.

  • No sense of progress
  • Too many choices at once
solution: We introduced a short, skippable setup that creates a starter workspace and walks people to their first win. Each step is optional and the progress is always visible.
result: Activation within the first session improved markedly, and members who completed setup were far more likely to return the following week.
